title: Protasparagus macowanii
taxonomy: Protasparagus macowanii is classified as a species within the genus Protasparagus, which is a group of flowering plants in the asparagus family (Asparagaceae). The genus Protasparagus is further grouped under the order Asparagales, which is a large and diverse order of flowering plants. This order is part of the monocot clade, which includes plants with one cotyledon in their seedlings. The class of Protasparagus macowanii is Liliopsida, which is the class of monocot flowering plants. At the highest taxonomic level, Protasparagus macowanii belongs to the kingdom Plantae.
